de.uka.ilkd.key.logic

Class PosInOccurrence.PIOPathIteratorImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.PosInOccurrence.PIOPathIteratorImpl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IntIterator, PIOPathIterator
    Enclosing class:
    PosInOccurrence

    private final class PosInOccurrence.PIOPathIteratorImpl
extends Object
implements PIOPathIterator

    • Constructor Detail

      • PosInOccurrence.PIOPathIteratorImpl

    • Method Detail

      • getChild

        public int getChild()
        Specified by:
        getChild in interface PIOPathIterator
        Returns:
        the number of the next child on the path, or -1 if no further child exists (this is the number that was also returned by the last call of next())

      • getPosInOccurrence

        public PosInOccurrence getPosInOccurrence()
        Specified by:
        getPosInOccurrence in interface PIOPathIterator
        Returns:
        the current position within the term (i.e. corresponding to the latest next()-call)

      • getSubTerm

        public Term getSubTerm()
        Specified by:
        getSubTerm in interface PIOPathIterator
        Returns:
        the current subterm this object points to (i.e. corresponding to the latest next()-call); this method satisfies getPosInOccurrence().subTerm()==getSubTerm()

      • hasNext

        public boolean hasNext()
        Specified by:
        hasNext in interface IntIterator
        Returns:
        boolean true iff collection has more unseen elements

      • next

        public int next()
        Specified by:
        next in interface IntIterator
        Specified by:
        next in interface PIOPathIterator
        Returns:
        the number of the next child on the path, or -1 if no further child exists
